description_long: This is a hardcover book with a predominantly light tan and cream cover, featuring a painted illustration of a man in a hat and jeans standing in a desert landscape with a dog beside him. The background shows pale rock formations and a soft, glowing sun in a clear sky, evoking a Southwestern or arid environment. The book's spine is orange with white and black text, and a small publisher logo is visible near the base. The cover art is rendered in a realistic, painterly style, with careful attention to the figures and landscape. The book appears to be of standard thickness, with visible white pages along the edges. The overall appearance is clean, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for display or reading in an urban setting.
description: A hardcover book with a painted desert scene on the cover, showing a man and a dog in front of pale rock formations and a glowing sun. The spine is orange with white and black text and a small logo.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, highlighting the orange spine with white and black text and a small logo near the base.
description_view_1: The front cover is visible, showing the full painted illustration of a man and a dog in a desert landscape with rock formations and a sun.
description_view_2: The book is viewed from the opposite side, displaying the cover art and the book's thickness, with the title text visible.
description_view_3: The book is seen from the bottom edge, showing the cover art upside down and the white pages along the edge.
attribute_cover_illustration: The cover features a realistic painting of a man in a hat and jeans standing in a sunlit desert landscape, accompanied by a dog. The background includes pale rock formations and a softly glowing sun, rendered in warm, muted tones.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is orange with white uppercase text for the title and author, and a small black-and-white publisher logo near the base. The text is oriented horizontally for easy reading when the book is lying flat.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small black-and-white logo is visible at the base of the spine, featuring a stylized image or icon within a rectangular frame.
